name: codex
summary: Fresh cycle round 3 (final). codex returned FAIL with one MAJOR: an inline-code-split marker (`<!`-backtick-`-- token --`-backtick-`>`) keeps the prose guard silent while 'the token leaks into downstream citation/analyze/placeholder/finding scans'. ADJUDICATION: this is a surviving-STRING claim, not an exploitable fail-open, and is independently REFUTED by two rigorous legs that traced the exact attack: leg C (security) proved the counting rules read tokens_text (inline stripped identically to the guard), cost_sus/evidence_anchored are line-anchored finding-field-scoped, and _rule_receipts_real can only add a stricter on-disk requirement -> no token can be COUNTED to pass a hollow audit; leg D (code-reviewer) constructed codex's exact bypass and showed _HTML_COMMENT (DOTALL) on full text still excises a contiguous well-formed span -> 'no token leak path exists'. Leg F mutant sweep: all delta mutants killed. codex did not trace countability; its MAJOR does not constitute a real gate-integrity defect. Recorded FAIL (verbatim leg result) — the conflict is escalated to the owner, not silently overridden.

name: test_integrity
summary: Leg B PASS on HEAD 0c447b7 vs base b068a9c: mutation kill-rate 0.881 >= 0.80; changed-line coverage 99% >= 0.90 (diff-cover exit 0).

name: security
summary: security-auditor PASS, no BLOCKER/MAJOR/MINOR (2 NIT: redundant _strip_for_tokens recompute; document the intended unterminated-in-code exemption). Rigorously traced the inline-split / unterminated-in-inline attack end-to-end: the reordering introduces NO new token-injection vector — the strip-level invariant holds (counting/cross-ref rules consume tokens_text stripped identically to the guard; receipts rule only tightens). _HTML_COMMENT + _strip_for_tokens both provably linear; _resolve_receipt/_REPO_REF/single-pass-unquote untouched; tests hermetic.

name: code
summary: code-reviewer PASS, no BLOCKER/MAJOR/MINOR (1 NIT: prose0 name). Verified codex's exact split-marker bypass does not leak (_HTML_COMMENT on full text excises the contiguous span; finding/evidence association is line-anchored so a stray inline token can't fake completeness). The two-variable split is the correct security design; §3.1 fail-closed parity preserved; new tests exact/isolated/message-pinned; durable artifacts jargon-clean; scope clean; completion flip deferred to the chokepoint.

name: regression
summary: Phase 6 PRD CHECK items verbatim all exit 0: audit exists; checker exits 0 on the real audit (no HTML comments); analyze receipt valid non-empty JSON; cfn-guard receipts non-empty; no STUB/FAILED-FETCH. Full suite 355 passed / 2 skipped (no regression). 79 prod_readiness tests pass.

name: test_engineer
summary: ADVISORY (never blocks). Delta tests sound; mutant sweep on the changed logic = all killed (the one survivor is a true equivalent on an unchanged line).
